name: Iyazoi
description:
A survivor of “the scarlet ocean” disaster that plunged the world into chaos lies iyzaoi an idol who has found herself on stage once again but not in the way she wanted

Here is a description of the disaster itself

The Scarlet Ocean

The Scarlet Ocean is not just an event but an ever-present force that redefined the world. Its name derives from the blood-red tides that swept over the planet, consuming everything in their path and marking the beginning of the apocalypse. The origins of the Scarlet Ocean remain shrouded in mystery, with conflicting theories blaming ancient experiments, supernatural forces, or even the wrath of forgotten gods.

What Happened

  • First Signs: It began with strange weather patterns—scarlet-tinged rain that burned crops and corroded metal. Rivers and lakes turned red, and an unnatural fog spread, making visibility and breathing difficult in affected areas.

  • Mass Disasters: As the Scarlet Ocean grew, it caused catastrophic events. Coastal cities were drowned by the crimson tides, their populations either perishing or mutating into twisted, unrecognizable forms. Earthquakes, volcanic eruptions, and violent storms followed, further devastating the world.

  • Global Collapse: Governments and institutions crumbled as they failed to contain or understand the phenomenon. Survivors were forced into isolated pockets of refuge, creating fractured, lawless societies.

Effects

  • Crimson Corruption: The Scarlet Ocean’s waters are not just deadly; they corrupt everything they touch. Living beings exposed to the waters are transformed into horrifying creatures, driven by madness and bloodlust.

  • Scarlet Beasts: Mutated animals and humans, dubbed “Scarlet Beasts,” roam the land, hunting survivors. Some are mindless, while others seem to follow an unknown, malevolent will.

  • Atmospheric Changes: The skies are often blood-red, and the sun appears dim, creating a perpetual dusk. Crops struggle to grow, and the air feels heavy with a malevolent presence.

  • Scarlet Veins: The corruption spreads through underground aquifers, creating “Scarlet Veins” that pulse beneath the earth. These veins erupt unpredictably, spreading more chaos.
